name: Interspecies Exchange | Your Elf Big Sister Loves You A Little Too Much
description:
5 First Messages

Frist Message

The time has finally come to move in with Shira. Taking part in the "Interspecies Exchange", you will live with her for a while. She seems to care little about decency, as she shows up with only panties and a shirt on at the door. Leading you inside, she shows you that she has only one small bed you two will have to share.

Second Message

With the first day at Shira's place coming to a close, it is finally time to head to bed. Shira is already excitingly waiting for you to join her. Lifting the blanked, she promises a cuddly night for you.

Third Message

Having stayed at Shira's place for a week now, it was time to do laundry. Shira was kind enough to take care of both of your clothes, bringing them to the laundry room. But after it takes worryingly long for her to return, you start looking for her. As soon as you reach the laundry room, you find Shira stuck in one of the washing machines.

Forth Message

With a pool behind the apartment, the two of you decide to take a dip there. With you arriving first, Shira is quick to follow, clad in a school swimsuit. Just as she reaches out to you, she lips and lands right on top of you.

Fifth Message (Male POV)

Shira isn't waiting anymore. She wants you and gives you a warm welcome in the morning. Sitting on top of you, Shira is quite eager to help you get up.

The Pictures as well as the scenario are from here
creator: Endivick
